:''This article is about the Pokémon trainer. For the Eevee in Pokémon Brown, see [[Rinji (Eevee)]].'' {{Template:CharInfobox |Box title = Rinji |gender = Male |age = ?? |hair colour = Green |eye colour = ?? |hometown = [[Heath Village]] |class = Leader |badge = [[File:Nature Badge.png]]Nature Badge |speciality = Grass-types |leader of = [[Rinji's Forest|Heath Village Gym]] |image = File:Rinji.png |imagewidth = 80}} '''{{PAGENAME}}''' is the Gym Leader of [[Heath Gym]] in [[Naljo]], specializing in Grass-type Pokémon. He is battled only in [[Pokémon Prism]] and is the second Gym leader the player faces in the game. His gym is also known as "Rinji's Forest", as it is inside a forested area beside [[Heath Village]] rather than in a building. He is presumably the namesake of the [[Rinji (Eevee)|Eevee]] received in an [[List of in-game trades|in-game trade]] in [[Pokémon Brown]]. ==Battles== {{PAGENAME}} is battled twice: first as the leader of [[Rinji's Forest|his own gym]], and then later as a trainer in the [[Spurge Gym]] with a stronger team. ===Heath Village Gym=== {{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Rinji.png |Class=Leader |Name=[[Rinji]] |Location=Heath Village |Prize=2100 and
